title: Musings inspired by picture in Playhouse
display_title: Musings inspired by picture in Playhouse
wikitext:
[]: Musings inspired by picture in Playhouse             Quote Post by Stillborn » Wed Jul 08, 2015 4:37 pm It started nagging me and I didn't want to derail a thread so I bring this here. Try to put down the bias you have for me before answering. Ray found this pic Ray wrote: Translation Please?  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Jul 08, 2015 5:48 pm For once, I completely agree with you, that's taking the easy for redemption.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Jul 08, 2015 5:51 pm Not sure why you care so much about some random unfinished single page of a fan manga, but I can't say you're wrong in the analysis.

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Wed Jul 08, 2015 5:56 pm I have no idea either. But it just came to me relentlesly, so I needed to share.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Jul 08, 2015 6:07 pm For once, I completely agree with you, that's taking the easy way for redemption.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jul 08, 2015 6:29 pm I totally agree, too. No other thoughts come to mind so you worded the scenario differences so perfectly. Hey there, Mariachi! Feels like it's been awhile!

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Jul 08, 2015 6:32 pm It has been a while. I'll try to appear from time to time, at least until we at last get some information about FINAL, at which time I'm pretty sure I'll go back in full force!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 08, 2015 6:57 pm I think that manga has more pages than that. Might want to look it up on pixiv before jumping to conclusions.

[]:             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Thu Jul 09, 2015 7:59 am I actually agree with you 100% there Stillborn. I know, is it the apocalypse? But in all seriousness, it's actually a very keen insight to the problem of this one-shot series, but highlights the cautious nature of humanity, how we're more likely to reach out to people that pose less of a threat to ourselves, then actually take a risk to care for someone worthwhile. It actually creates a kind of "calling the kettle black" scenario here, where Shinji has been chastised for only retreating to "easy relationships" in order to interact (such as Kaworu, who's all give and no take) instead of actually trying to form relationships that worth the risk of pain, and yet here's Wille doing the very same thing under the guise of "absolution", but actually because this version of Shinji is just easier to deal with. Looks like Shinji and Wille aren't so different after all? Guess that highlights the tragedy of the situation. Overall, pretty good insight Stillborn, you should do this more often.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu Jul 09, 2015 8:55 am I actually agree with Stillborn for once. Maybe I need to take the rest of the day off and go lay down for a bit or something. But seriously, yeah, you're right. This is a cheat in much the same way the Manga ending was a cheat -- if the hedgehogs aren't figuring out how to get close without hurting one another too much the whole point of the story goes out the window.

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Thu Jul 09, 2015 9:33 am xanderkh wrote: Overall, pretty good insight Stillborn, you should do this more often.

[]:             Quote Post by Rosenakahara » Thu Jul 09, 2015 10:38 am Note that when i said it was one of the happier endings for him i did mean it, thing is though that wouldn't fit the theme of annos movies at all.
